title: Author AbilityClassification ordinality table — HM/TM/starter/specialty
description:
Per [[agent-abilities-pokemon-mechanics-with-topology-2026-05-26]]. Typed ordinality table classifying agent abilities: `0 = hmEquivalent` (mandatory utility every agent should have — wd, roster, maybe thread-spin/close); `1 = starter` (acquired at agent commissioning); `2 = tmEquivalent` (situational specialty — agentify-capture, playwright, build-macos-apps); `3 = restrictedArchetypeOnly` (only certain agent archetypes can learn — e.g., apple-pi cannot learn cloud-deploy); `4 = orphan` (currently held by 0 agents — substrate-gap signal); `5 = nearUbiquitous` (held by N-1 of N agents — candidate for promotion to substrate-shared LinkRef). Frozen ordinals per [[ordinality-table-entries-immutable-once-released]]. Substrate-doctrine driven categories — extend as topology analysis reveals new patterns.

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- (NEW ordinality table — no direct cost-type composition)
